title: noccaea aghrica
intro: Noccaea aghrica, also known as Armenian cranesbill or Aghrica gypsophila, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health, offering benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory congestion. Noccaea aghrica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in cooking, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity.
